features.title: Ingestion pipeline: Docling parse + paragraph ID extraction
features.notes: Verified Docling parsing for both source PDFs. Doc 1 preserves normalized [NNNN] locators; doc 2 preserves unique section/example locators with locator_type.

features.title: Chunking: Chonkie recursive chunker with clause-aware split rules
features.notes: Target 150-300 tokens per chunk, hard split on paragraph/table boundaries, metadata: paragraph_id, section, doc_id, doc_title.

features.title: Embedding + Qdrant upsert (dense + sparse hybrid collection)
features.notes: voyage-3-large for dense; Qdrant native sparse or fastembed for BM25-style vectors.

features.title: Hybrid retrieval module: dense + sparse fusion + Voyage rerank
features.notes: Top 20 fused -> rerank-2 -> top 5. Discard below rerank score threshold 0.3 (tune after eval).

features.title: Citation-constrained synthesis via Kimi API
features.notes: Every claim must carry [paragraph_id]. Explicit not-found path required and tested. Prompt lives in backend/synthesis/prompt.py. Uses Kimi via the OpenAI-compatible client.

features.title: Evaluation harness: qa_set.json + run_eval.py (Recall@5, MRR, groundedness)
features.notes: 20-30 hand-labeled Q/A pairs. Target Recall@5 >= 0.85, groundedness >= 0.90.

features.title: FastAPI app: /query, /health endpoints + CORS
features.verification: uvicorn backend.main:app & curl -sf http://localhost:8000/health && pytest backend/tests/test_api.py
features.notes: Wires retrieval + synthesis together. CORS must allow the deployed frontend origin.

features.title: Frontend: query box, example chips, answer cards with citation panels
features.verification: cd frontend && npm run build && npm run lint
features.notes: Confidence badge (High/Partial/Not found). Mobile-responsive. No login. Calls backend /query only.

features.title: Second document ingested (cross-document retrieval proof)
features.notes: Preempts 'only works on one PDF' skepticism. Public regulatory doc or second Bionema patent.

features.title: Deploy backend (Render/Fly.io) + frontend (Vercel) + smoke test
features.notes: Backend cold start acceptable if /health responds within a few seconds; frontend load < 2s. All example questions must return correct cited answers on the live URLs.

features.title: README + eval summary for non-technical forwarding
features.notes: Plain-language architecture explanation + eval results summary suitable for sending directly to prospect.
